name: Pumpkin Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Unroll the phyllo dough and lay it over the prepared pie dish, pressing into place.
2. Cut off excess dough with kitchen scissors.
3. In a blender, mix cream cheese, pumpkin puree, skim milk, egg whites, pumpkin pie spice, maple syrup or honey, and vanilla extract until well combined.
4. Pour the filling into the crust.
5. Brush the edges of the crust with skim milk.
6. Wrap the edges securely with aluminum foil.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
8. Before serving, brush the edges again and bake for an additional 15 minutes to brown the crust.
